name: Rosuvastatin As pirin And Clopidogrel Capsules
about: Rosuvastatin Aspirin And Clopidogrel Capsules are a combination medicine used to treat patients who have suffered a heart attack or stroke. The capsules contain three active ingredients, Rosuvastatin, Aspirin, and Clopidogrel. Rosuvastatin belongs to a class of drugs called statins that lower bad cholesterol levels, while Aspirin and Clopidogrel prevent blood clots. The medicine is available in capsules and the packaging contains 10*10 tablets. The dosage guidelines should be followed as per the doctors suggestion. The medicine should be stored in a cool place and has been manufactured in India.
